recommendations.title: Mountainhead
recommendations.overview: A group of billionaire friends get together against the backdrop of a rolling international crisis.

recommendations.title: The Raffle
recommendations.overview: Struggling with a financial crisis, a good-looking widow decides to put herself up for grabs. However, going through with it becomes almost impossible with a new love and the legal system thrown into the mix.

recommendations.title: The House Is Black
recommendations.overview: Set in a leper colony in the north of Iran, The House is Black juxtaposes "ugliness," of which there is much in the world as stated in the opening scenes, with religion and gratitude.

recommendations.title: Blown Away
recommendations.overview: After her mother is killed by a car bomb, a 17-year-old girl lives a reckless and decadent lifestyle. She begins having sex with a boy who works at a local ski resort. He falls in love, and she tells him of her suspicions that her strict father was r

recommendations.title: A Time for Drunken Horses
recommendations.overview: After their father dies, a family of five children are forced to survive on their own in a Kurdish village on the border of Iran and Iraq.

recommendations.title: Platoon
recommendations.overview: As a young and naive recruit in Vietnam, Chris Taylor faces a moral crisis when confronted with the horrors of war and the duality of man.

recommendations.title: Danny Boy
recommendations.overview: Soldier Brian Wood, is accused of war crimes in Iraq by the human rights lawyer Phil Shiner. The two men go head to head in a legal and moral conflict that takes us from the battlefield, at so-called Checkpoint Danny Boy, to the courtroom and one of

recommendations.title: Destiny
recommendations.overview: As a young couple stops and rests in a small village inn, the man is abducted by Death and is sequestered behind a huge doorless, windowless wall. The woman finds a mystic entrance and is met by Death, who tells her three separate stories set in exot

recommendations.title: Welcome, or No Trespassing
recommendations.overview: Children rebel against the strict rules and regulations they face during their time in a Communist Young Pioneer camp.

recommendations.title: Storytelling
recommendations.overview: College and high school serve as the backdrop for two stories about dysfunction and personal turmoil.
